fields.inlineHelpText: This field represents either the Event Date, or the Beginning Date of a multi-day event.
fields.label: Event Date
fields.name: Event_Date__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Only if applicable.
fields.label: Target # of Attendees
fields.name: Expected_attendees__c

fields.inlineHelpText: These are high-level targets that your campaign will achieve.
fields.label: Goals
fields.name: Goals__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Enter the name of the venue, followed by the address.
fields.label: Location Details
fields.name: Location_Details__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The first 2 digits are codes for the Type of Marketing tactic. The next 6 digits are the date of the activity or start date of the campaign "mmddyy". The last 2 digits indicate the Business Practice. Press the Marketing Codes Key button for code details.
fields.label: Marketing Code
fields.name: Marketing_Code__c

fields.inlineHelpText: What industry(s) are being focused on for this campaign?
fields.label: Target Industry
fields.name: Target_Industry__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Aggregates Total Leads and Total Contacts that are members of this campaign
fields.label: Total Members
fields.name: Total_Invitees2__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF( Data_Quality_Score__c =100,"All Campaign Details Captured", "Missing: "&IF( LEN( Name)<5,"Meaningful Campaign Name, ","")&""&IF(ISPICKVAL( Type ,""), "Type, ","")&""&IF( ISPICKVAL( Status ,""), "Status, ","")&""&IF( LEN(TEXT(MONTH( StartDate )))=0, "Start Date, ","")&""&IF( LEN(TEXT(MONTH( EndDate )))=0, "End Date, ","")&""&IF(NumberOfContacts  +  NumberOfLeads = 0, "No Associated Members, ","")&""&IF( LEN(TEXT( ExpectedRevenue ))=0, "Expected Revenue",""))
fields.label: Data Quality Description
fields.name: Data_Quality_Description__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF(LEN(  Name  ) < 5, 0,20) + IF(ISPICKVAL(  Type ,"" ), 0,20) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Status ,"" ), 0,20) + IF(LEN( TEXT(MONTH( StartDate )))= 0, 0,10) + IF( LEN(TEXT(MONTH( EndDate ))) = 0, 0,10) + IF(  NumberOfContacts  +  NumberOfLeads = 0, 0,10)  + IF( LEN( TEXT( ExpectedRevenue ) ) = 0, 0,10)
fields.label: Data Quality Score
fields.name: Data_Quality_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The count of the number of MLC Assets associated with the campaign where the MLC Asset status is NOT equal to "Returned"
fields.label: Total MLC Assets Not Returned
fields.name: Total_MLC_Assets_Not_Returned__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The count of the number of MLC Assets associated with the campaign where the MLC Asset status is equal to "Received"
fields.label: Total MLC Assets - Status is Received
fields.name: Total_MLC_Assets_Status_is_Received__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The count of the number of MLC Assets associated with the campaign where the MLC Asset status is equal to "Returned"
fields.label: Total MLC Assets - Status is Returned
fields.name: Total_MLC_Assets_Status_is_Returned__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The count of the number of MLC Assets associated with the campaign where the MLC Asset status is equal to "Shipped"
fields.label: Total MLC Assets - Status is Shipped
fields.name: Total_MLC_Assets_Status_is_Shipped__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The count of the total number of MLC Assets associated with the campaign.
fields.label: Total MLC Assets in Campaign
fields.name: Total_MLC_Assets_in_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The total number of calls related to the campaign.
fields.label: Calls Related to Campaign
fields.name: Calls_Related_to_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Number of Discovery Meetings where the "Related to" value of the discovery meeting is equal to the Campaign.
fields.label: Discovery Meetings Related to Campaign
fields.name: Discovery_Meetings_Related_to_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Discovery Meetings Related to the Campaign/ Total MLC Assets not Returned
fields.label: Effective Meeting Success Rate
fields.name: Effective_Meeting_Success_Rate__c

fields.inlineHelpText: All non-discovery meetings related to the campaign
fields.label: Other Meetings in Campaign
fields.name: Meetings_Related_to_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The total number of tasks related to the campaign.
fields.label: Tasks Related to Campaign
fields.name: Tasks_Related_to_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The total number of meetings related to the campaign
fields.label: Total Meetings Related to Campaign
fields.name: Total_Meetings_Related_to_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Total MIT Margin from opportunities in the campaign.
fields.label: MIT Margin in Campaign
fields.name: MIT_Margin_in_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Total MIT Margin from Closed Won opportunities in the campaign.
fields.label: MIT Margin Closed Won in Campaign
fields.name: MIT_Margin_Closed_Won_in_Campaign__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The number of Google Ad Campaign Clicks
fields.label: Google Ad Campaign Clicks
fields.name: Google_Campaign_Clicks__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The number of Google Ad Campaign Impressions
fields.label: Google Ad Campaign Impressions
fields.name: Google_Ad_Campaign_Impressions__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The number of Google Ad Campaign Conversions
fields.label: Google Ad Campaign Conversions
fields.name: Google_Ad_Campaign_Conversions__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The monthly Google Ad Budget
fields.label: Monthly Google Ad Budget
fields.name: Monthly_Ad_Budget__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The count of the number of MLC Assets associated with the campaign where the MLC Asset status is equal to "Undeliverable"
fields.label: Total MLC Assets - Status is Undeliver
fields.name: Total_MLC_Assets_Status_is_Undeliver__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The 3rd party partner that is helping to fund the campaign or support the campaign.
fields.label: Partner
fields.name: Partner__c

fields.inlineHelpText: the total cost of returned assets that are put back into inventory and can be re-used.
fields.label: Returned Asset Price
fields.name: Returned_Asset_Price__c

fields.label: Returned Shipping Costs
